svg.title: Protected PCM restoration data placeholder
svg.desc: Hidden protected layer placeholder. In generated reversible SVGs, this layer contains the actual PCM geometry used for audio restoration. Lock or hide it; do not edit or delete it.

g.desc: Generated reversible SVGs replace this placeholder with mulaw8-protected-geometry-v1 data. Visible PCM carriers can be redrawn freely while this protected layer preserves restoration.
